_comment: Diarization (opt-in far-end path) on the FULL dough episode (7 real speakers) → cpWER + speaker-count-error vs the full turns.json, plus peak RSS (diarize loads pyannote-seg + TitaNet embedding). Tunes the over-clustering knob (#18): diarize_threshold and the known-count override num_clusters=7. titanet only (the fetched embedding). Full-episode WER here also includes inserted ads (a documented noise floor), so read cpWER/speaker-count, not absolute WER.
